backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor with no logic, serving as a placeholder since the project is a static informational website.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (header restructure, AI chatbot panel, voice assistant) to their affected files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, used as build planning reference for the DSOUZA BANK project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the DSOUZA BANK React SPA, mounting the app at the root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five page routes wrapped in ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, and four context providers.
frontend/src/components/AccessibilityCon: UI component providing a font size dropdown and high contrast toggle button using the AccessibilityContext.
frontend/src/components/BrandStatementBa: Decorative banner section on the homepage displaying DSOUZA BANK's brand promise, key stats, and CTA buttons with animated reveal.
frontend/src/components/ChatbotDialog.ts: Interactive AI chatbot dialog component with message history, typing indicator, speech recognition input, and text-to-speech output using the Web Speech API.
frontend/src/components/ChatbotPanel.tsx: A sliding chatbot panel component (DSOUZA AI) that supports multilingual conversations (English, Hindi, Marathi, Kannada, Tamil) with predefined responses for banking queries like balance, loans, and transfers.
frontend/src/components/EmergencySecurit: A floating emergency button that opens a confirmation dialog allowing users to instantly freeze cards, disable UPI, and alert the support team, with toast feedback on completion.
frontend/src/components/ExperienceSelect: A section component rendering four selectable banking experience cards (Rural, Senior, Digital, Business) that update global experience context with animated selection states.
frontend/src/components/FamilyFinancialP: A multi-widget financial planning component containing sub-components for a home loan tracker, an interactive education cost calculator with sliders, and a tax-saving dashboard with progress indicators.
frontend/src/components/FinancialHealthS: A financial health dashboard displaying animated circular progress rings for savings, investment, insurance, and emergency fund scores, along with AI-generated prioritized recommendations.
frontend/src/components/FinancialWellbei: Renders a dashboard card displaying four financial wellbeing metrics (investment growth, savings goal, insurance cover, retirement plan) as interactive grid items with hover animations and color-coded icons.
A stub component that renders nothing, kept for reference after the floating chatbot trigger was moved into the Header component.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site-wide footer with brand info, quick navigation links, services list, social media icons, and a bottom bar with copyright and legal links.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with scroll-aware styling, nav links, language switcher, accessibility controls, a chatbot panel toggle, and a voice assistant dropdown.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSwitcher: A dropdown UI component that lets users switch the app language among six supported Indian languages using the LanguageContext.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that composes the Header, Footer, EmergencySecurityButton, and Toaster around the router's Outlet for page content.
A toggle button group allowing users to select or deselect a life stage mode (Youth, Family, Senior, Rural) via the LifeStageContext.
frontend/src/components/LoanCalculatorSe: An interactive loan EMI calculator section with sliders for loan amount, interest rate, and term, displaying computed EMI, total payment, and total interest.
frontend/src/components/motion/LoadingDo: A small animated loading indicator showing three bouncing dots, with a static fallback for users who prefer reduced motion.
frontend/src/components/motion/MotionRev: A scroll-triggered reveal animation wrapper component that fades and translates children into view using IntersectionObserver, with reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/motion/RouteTran: A thin wrapper component that applies a CSS route-transition class to page content during navigation, skipping animation when reduced motion is preferred.
frontend/src/components/OfflineIndicator: Listens to browser online/offline events and displays a fixed alert banner at the bottom-left when the user loses network connectivity.
frontend/src/components/ProtectionSecuri: Renders an insurance product hub with expandable cards for health, life, senior, micro, and crop insurance, plus a protection assessment quiz and a claim process walkthrough with step-by-step UI.
frontend/src/components/RuralEmpowerment: Displays a rural banking features section with six cards covering low-data mode, voice banking, SMS banking, government scheme tracking, micro-loans, and crop insurance, adapting layout based on the rural life stage context.
frontend/src/components/SeniorSafeMode.t: Provides a senior-focused banking section with accessibility controls (large font, high contrast toggles), pension/FD info cards, and an account freeze confirmation dialog, adapting styling for senior life stage mode.
frontend/src/components/StatsRow.tsx: Renders a row of animated stat cards (customers, branches, years, satisfaction) that count up to their target values when scrolled into view, respecting reduced-motion preferences.
frontend/src/components/TrustSecuritySec: Displays a trust and security section with six cards highlighting RBI regulation, encryption, DICGC insurance, ISO certification, fraud monitoring, and instant alerts, with hover animations and motion-reveal transitions.
frontend/src/components/VoiceAssistant.t: A React component that provides voice-activated banking assistance using the Web Speech API, recognizing spoken commands and responding with text-to-speech about DSOUZA Bank services and life-stage banking products.
frontend/src/components/VoiceAssistantDr: A multilingual voice assistant dropdown component supporting 7 Indian languages, using speech recognition and synthesis to answer banking queries about balance, loans, and transfers with language-specific responses.
frontend/src/components/YouthDreamBuilde: A React section component targeting youth users that displays savings goal trackers, gamified achievement badges, an investment step guide, and an interactive credit score simulator.
frontend/src/contexts/AccessibilityConte: A React context provider that manages and persists font size and high-contrast mode preferences, applying corresponding CSS classes to the document root.
A React context provider that stores and persists the user's selected experience mode (digital, rural, senior, business), applying a senior-mode CSS class to the body when applicable.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: A React context provider that manages the active UI language across 6 Indian languages, providing a translation lookup function and persisting the selection to localStorage.
frontend/src/contexts/LifeStageContext.t: Provides a React context for managing the user's life stage (youth, family, senior, rural), persisting the value to localStorage and applying a corresponding CSS class to the document root.
frontend/src/contexts/VoiceGuidanceConte: Provides a React context for controlling browser-based text-to-speech voice guidance, including enable/disable state persisted to localStorage and speak/stop utilities.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useInViewOnce.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to detect when an element enters the viewport once, respecting the prefers-reduced-motion media query.
frontend/src/hooks/usePrefersReducedMoti: Custom hook that listens to the prefers-reduced-motion media query and returns a boolean indicating whether the user has requested reduced motion.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder file indicating no backend queries are needed for this static informational website.
frontend/src/hooks/useTTS.ts: Custom hook wrapping the Web Speech API's SpeechSynthesis to provide speak, stop, pause, and resume functions along with speaking state and support detection.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for a lavender-themed design system (light/dark modes), glassmorphism utilities, and keyframe animations for voice/chat UI elements.
frontend/src/lib/speechTypes.ts: Declares shared TypeScript interfaces and global Window augmentations for the Web Speech API (SpeechRecognition), serving as a single source of truth to avoid duplicate type declarations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About page with sections for company values, a historical milestone timeline, and a hero section, using animated MotionReveal components and navigation.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page with a hero section, four info cards (address, phone, email, hours), and a contact form with simulated submission using toast notifications and loading state.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page featuring a hero section, feature grid, testimonials, stats row, loan calculator, experience selector, trust/security section, and financial wellbeing card.
frontend/src/pages/NeoPage.tsx: Marketing page for the NEO mobile banking app, showcasing core features and life-stage-specific functionality (student, first job, family, business, retirement) with CTAs to contact and services pages.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Services page organized by life stage (Student, First Job, Family, Business Growth) using tabs, each displaying categorized banking product cards with feature lists.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with DSOUZA BANK custom colors, fonts (Playfair Display, DM Sans), shadows, animations, and plugins for animate and typography.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the DSOUZA BANK fintech site's current version, architectural notes for header icon ordering (Font Size Toggle, Language Selector, Accessibility, AI Chatbot, Voice Assistant), and existing feature definitions for those header controls.
